access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID used by the AWS CLI in the guest VM.

secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key used by the AWS CLI in the guest VM.

region.description: Default AWS Region for the configured profile.

session_token.description: Optional AWS session token for temporary IAM credentials.

profile.description: AWS CLI profile name to configure. Defaults to default.

output.description: Default AWS CLI output format. Defaults to json.
